articles.summary: CBA排名：前12名正式确定 南京锁定尾班车 多队即将进入卡位大战 Sina Sports
articles.full_body:
Title: CBA排名：前12名正式确定 南京锁定尾班车 多队即将进入卡位大战

URL Source: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxPUVlzbVYxQXhQVUJneENQNFVWczZZQmZjVzZiY1NaZXBQM25xbUxUS1BfaVI3QjJydG9PY1ppUkpHbjhyYVFrY3MzeHA3M1FpZ1g1Y0RrTnlIRHJnUGhpV19BSXpCOVU5UFN3dFhpVnJCVXNsQVJzTDBXdzh6R3VyRWdfbVpDRkpnV19hNWFLSDVpdjNzU1pn

Published Time: 2026-07-24 01:33:21

Markdown Content:
[![Image 9](blob:http://localhost/51baf7b72fe6cdac85d933fb68bb7570)**打开新浪新闻 发现更多精彩** 打开](javascript:void(0);)

[](https://sina.cn/?vt=4 "手机新浪网")
## [新浪体育](https://sports.sina.cn/?vt=4 "新浪体育")

[](https://sina.cn/Index/nav?vt=4 "网站导航")[![Image 10](blob:http://localhost/a60b3ebabb24ca182698fd8650939101)](https://my.sina.cn/?vt=4)
# CBA排名：前12名正式确定 南京锁定尾班车 多队即将进入卡位大战

_![Image 11](https://n.sinaimg.cn/sinakd10217/360/w180h180/20200304/5fd6-iqmtvwu4608778.gif)_

## 每日新闻摘录

07.24 01:33 

[关注](javascript:void(0))

![Image 12](https://k.sinaimg.cn/n/sinakd20260724s/153/w640h313/20260724/ab52-333ab48f70a54f0333b64a6ba28630e2.jpg/w300h300z1l10t10q100646.jpg)

![Image 13](https://n.sinaimg.cn/default/835df0f5/20260611/2026titledown.png)
# 全景美加墨，为热爱喝彩

去查看

北京时间3月18日，CBA常规赛继续开打，今夜上演2场比赛，新疆客场不敌浙江，南京爆冷击败广东，这就意味着南京历史上首次锁定季后赛，而随着前12名的正式确定，这就意味着接下来多队进入到卡位大战是可以预见，尤其是一些战绩只相差1-2个胜差，非常考验球队管理层的斗智斗勇。

[![Image 14](https://k.sinaimg.cn/n/sinakd20260724s/153/w640h313/20260724/ab52-333ab48f70a54f0333b64a6ba28630e2.jpg/w700d1q75cms.jpg?by=cms_fixed_width)](javascript:void(0))
首先是四强级别的球队，广厦，山西锁定第一和第二，几乎就是时间问题了，尤其是山西爆冷不敌福建之后，他们想要追上广厦恐是只剩下理论的可能性。新疆和北京都是29胜，但新疆少打一轮的局势下，这就意味着积分方面未能体现出全部，北京凭借一波9连胜同样冲上了积分榜前四，考虑到接下来对手只剩下南京，浙江两支季后赛级别的球队，北京能否以全胜的姿态结束常规赛的争夺，值得外界的关注。

[![Image 15](https://k.sinaimg.cn/n/sinakd20260724s/442/w526h716/20260724/e0e0-02897de4e93b28ae0733b7aa0981a1e1.jpg/w700d1q75cms.jpg?by=cms_fixed_width)](javascript:void(0))[![Image 16](https://k.sinaimg.cn/n/sinakd20260724s/346/w500h646/20260724/ceba-a7648cbe497ad5a99dc023e4b459bab1.jpg/w700d1q75cms.jpg?by=cms_fixed_width)](javascript:void(0))
5-10名同样颇为具有看点，从山东到上海都只相差2个胜场，上海还需要补赛，若是前四基本上“明牌”的局势下，这些中游球队恐是有反选的可能性，特别是广东，辽宁，浙江都是过去几个赛季的季后赛四强热门球队，以他们在季后赛的经验，以及目前的人员储备，或许除了广厦之外，其他球队都具备一战之力。尤其是卫冕冠军辽宁男篮，他们作为3连冠球队，正如杨鸣此前接受采访提到那样，真正的总冠军只会在5月份产生，常规赛一些伤病，战绩起伏都是联赛一部分。

[![Image 17](https://k.sinaimg.cn/n/sinakd20260724s/180/w640h340/20260724/3cf8-be8df5dc23f62c471627db5c21676aca.jpg/w700d1q75cms.jpg?by=cms_fixed_width)](javascript:void(0))
青岛和上海则是各有难处，青岛还需要在外援层面做出进一步调整，刘维伟并不满意球队第三阶段的整体表现，特别是先后不敌辽宁，北京，北控，山西一波4连败跌出积分榜前八。上海则是面临比较大的伤病困扰，卢伟需要在季后赛来临前让核心球员恢复到足够健康的身体状态。

[![Image 18](https://k.sinaimg.cn/n/sinakd20260724s/687/w640h847/20260724/b1fb-356a468211dbddfa00b13fbbc1adbebe.jpg/w700d1q75cms.jpg?by=cms_fixed_width)](javascript:void(0))
北控和南京的战绩恐就很难有太大幅度调整，尤其是南京目前只有21胜，接下来还有不少硬仗需要打，林葳等人尚未复出的层面，南京很大概率锁定积分榜第12排名。

![Image 19](https://n.sinaimg.cn/default/2fb77759/20151125/320X320.png)

打开新浪新闻

articles.title: Man Utd handed Tchouameni boost - Friday's gossip
articles.summary: Real Madrid open to selling Aurelien Tchouameni to Manchester United, Arsenal eye John Stones and Ezri Konsa, Chelsea favourites for Kerim Alajbegovic, Yan Diomande back on radar of Premier League clubs and Daizen Maeda set for Ipswich Town move.

# Man Utd handed Tchouameni boost - Friday's gossip

Image gallery[Skip image gallery](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/articles/cedjnz7wxy6o#storyboard-1-end-of-image-gallery)
1.   ![Image 1: Sun back page](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/ace/standard/1200/cpsprodpb/ab8e/live/fb28b310-86e4-11f1-926f-c90d1bcfbc84.jpg)   Image source, Sun 

Image caption, Sun back page  
2.   ![Image 2: Mirror sports section](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/ace/standard/3840/cpsprodpb/7e4c/live/c9046cb0-86e1-11f1-926f-c90d1bcfbc84.jpg)   Image source, Mirror 

Image caption, Mirror sports section  
3.   ![Image 3: Telegraph sports section](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/ace/standard/3840/cpsprodpb/6ef5/live/d2634240-86e1-11f1-bee8-53ce494e1abc.jpg)   Image source, Telegraph 

Image caption, Telegraph sports section  
4.   ![Image 4: Guardian sports section](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/ace/standard/3840/cpsprodpb/a885/live/b4496390-86e4-11f1-926f-c90d1bcfbc84.jpg)   Image source, Guardian

*   Published 1 hour ago 

**_Real Madrid open to selling Aurelien Tchouameni to_**[**_Manchester United_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/manchester-united)**_,_**[**_Arsenal_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/arsenal)**_eye John Stones and Ezri Konsa,_**[**_Chelsea_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/chelsea)**_favourites for Kerim Alajbegovic, Yan Diomande back on radar of Premier League clubs and Daizen Maeda set for_**[**_Ipswich Town_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/ipswich-town)**_move._**

La Liga giants **Real Madrid**are open to selling 26-year-old France defensive midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni to [**Manchester United**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/manchester-united). **(**[Sun, external](https://www.thesun.co.uk/sport/39846474/)

articles.title: A night of brilliant batting but Livingstone's efforts fall just short
articles.summary: Liam Livingstone hits 69 off 40 balls as he almost leads London Spirit to a successful chase of 139 against Manchester Super Giants, but is bowled with just three balls remaining as his side fall short in their opening game of The Hundred.
articles.full_body:

# A night of brilliant batting but Livingstone's efforts fall just short

## This content is not available in your location.

There was an error

Liam Livingstone hits 69 off 40 balls as he almost leads London Spirit to a successful chase of 139 against Manchester Super Giants, but is bowled with just three balls remaining as his side fall short in their opening game of The Hundred.

READ MORE: [Super Giants beat Spirit despite Livingstone flurry](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/cricket/articles/cvgxe515jdno)
